question: Ayo Dosunmu: Points Over 14.5
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 2 at 8:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Ayo Dosunmu scores more than 14.5 points during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Ayo Dosunmu scores 14.5 points or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 4, 1AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Set 1 Winner: Sramkova vs Rakhimova
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Rebecca Sramkova and Kamilla Rakhimova in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 3 2026.
This market will resolve to “Sramkova” if Rebecca Sramkova wins the first set. It will resolve to “Rakhimova” if Kamilla Rakhimova wins the first set.
If the match begins but is not completed, and the first set is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on that completed set. If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50.
If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA match statistics.
groupItemTitle: Brisbane International, Qualification: Rebecca Sramkova vs Kamilla Rakhimova Set 1 Winner

events.title: Brisbane International, Qualification: Rebecca Sramkova vs Kamilla Rakhimova
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Rebecca Sramkova and Kamilla Rakhimova in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 2 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Sramkova' if Rebecca Sramkova advances against Kamilla Rakhimova.

This market will resolve to 'Rakhimova' if Kamilla Rakhimova advances against Rebecca Sramkova.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Sramkova vs. Rakhimova: Match O/U 21.5
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Rebecca Sramkova and Kamilla Rakhimova in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 3 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 22. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.

question: Solana Up or Down - January 4, 1AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: XRP Up or Down - January 4, 1AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 4, 4AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Spread: Magic (-5.5)
description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 2 at 8:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Magic" if the Magic win the game by 6 or more points.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Bulls". If the game ends in a tie, this market will resolve to "Bulls".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Magic vs. Bulls
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for January 2 at 8:00PM ET:
If the Magic win, the market will resolve to "Magic".
If the Bulls win, the market will resolve to "Bulls".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

question: Raiders Team Total: O/U 13.5
description:
In the upcoming NFL game between Chiefs and Raiders, scheduled for January 4 at 12:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Raiders score 14 or more points in this game.

If the Raiders score less than 14 points, this market will resolve to "Under".

This market is based solely on the Raiders's score, not the combined score of both teams.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Chiefs vs. Raiders
events.description:
In the upcoming NFL game, scheduled for January 4 at 12:00AM ET:
If Chiefs wins, the market will resolve to "Chiefs".
If Raiders wins, the market will resolve to "Raiders".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely or ends in a tie, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

question: Set Handicap: Zhang (-1.5) vs Preston (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Shuai Zhang and Taylah Preston in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 3 2026.
This market will resolve to "Zhang" if Shuai Zhang wins by 2 or more sets than Taylah Preston, based on the final completed score. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Preston."
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official WTA results.
groupItemTitle: Brisbane International, Qualification: Shuai Zhang vs Taylah Preston Set Handicap +/-1.5

events.title: Brisbane International, Qualification: Shuai Zhang vs Taylah Preston
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Shuai Zhang and Taylah Preston in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 2 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Zhang' if Shuai Zhang advances against Taylah Preston.

This market will resolve to 'Preston' if Taylah Preston advances against Shuai Zhang.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

description:

question: Brisbane International, Qualification: Gabriela Ruse vs Zeynep Sonmez
description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Gabriela Ruse and Zeynep Sonmez in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 2 at 10:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Ruse' if Gabriela Ruse advances against Zeynep Sonmez.

This market will resolve to 'Sonmez' if Zeynep Sonmez advances against Gabriela Ruse.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the WTA Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Will the highest temperature in London be -1°C or below on January 4?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 4 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the London City Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 4 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the London City Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/gb/london/EGLC.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: Ethereum Up or Down - January 4, 6AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the ETH/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the ETH/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/ETH_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance ETH/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

This market refers on the tennis match between Jacob Fearnley and Dane Sweeny in the Brisbane International, Qualification, scheduled for January 2 at 8:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Fearnley' if Jacob Fearnley advances against Dane Sweeny.

This market will resolve to 'Sweeny' if Dane Sweeny advances against Jacob Fearnley.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

question: Will the highest temperature in Toronto be -4°C or below on January 4?
description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Toronto Pearson Intl Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 4 Jan '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Toronto Pearson Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/ca/mississauga/CYYZ.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

question: XRP Up or Down - January 4, 7AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the XRP/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the XRP/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/XRP_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance XRP/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.
